active_campaign.name: Post-v1.4 Research Operations
active_campaign.publication_rule: The v1.5.0 campaign may advance to release-candidate only after its evidence gate passes, all generated outputs are current, and a maintainer explicitly changes the lifecycle. Release-ready additionally requires a fully passing merged-main operational audit.

operating_rules: An archived release snapshot is immutable and cannot be reused as the active campaign.
Campaign lifecycle changes require a maintainer-reviewed source change; builders only validate and publish state.
Blocked evidence remains blocked until the published evidence requirement is met without artificial activity.
Active missions must preserve repository safeguards, independent usefulness, privacy, and fail-closed adjudication.
